Bug / Task Description: Shards are distributed round-robin across the node list, and the per-node shard counts come out balanced — but the specific shard-to-node assignment is shifted by one position. A later operation that names the expected owner of a given shard is rejected because that shard is actually held by a different node than the round-robin order should produce. Restore the correct shard-to-node mapping.
Commit Subject: fix(shard): correct round-robin owner assignment in Rebalance
